title: Unicorn Of The Farlands
description: Explore the forest that has been lost to time, its residents and what has been left behind by those that came before you.
body:
![Unicorn Of The Farlands](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/33d690b1f06d692c65634f74537d864ad63d1c54.png)

> ### _Welcome to the Lost Forest of the Farlands_

![Features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/19811a8da50bab1795e6397821498db967d37226.png)


- **New Dimension!**
The Farlands: A desolate world in eternal darkness.
- **New Biomes!**
You can find the Lost Forest in the Overworld, while the Twilight Meadows, the Midnight and Night Forest are in the Farlands.
- **New Blocks!**
Each added wood block comes with its own crafts and variations. (Except Boats)
- **New Mobs to Trade with!**
You can trade with Duendes using berries (sweet or glow), or maybe risk one amethyst shard for something more valuable. Be careful, sometimes they like to take your berries and give nothing back!
You can trade with sturnellas! use some seeds on the little birds to get small gifts.
- **New Rideable Mob!**
You can find the Unicorn in the Overworld and Farlands, and can tame it using Nature's Bounty.
- **New Armor Set!**
Use the Celestite Shard and some gold to craft a new shiny set, plus a sword!
- **New Structures!**
At the moment the mod has 3 structures, 2 of them in the Solaflora biome,the other in the Twilight Meadow. They come with its own custom chest loot.

![Plans for The Future](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a47692c049c188a156e132f39f385bdf21423cf9.png)

The mod is still very much in development, and this is a team of 2 who has no experience making a full mod, and I can say we (specially me) habe been biting more than we can chew. But we will be working to improve it slowly.
Right now, our main objectives for the next versions are:
- Polish the Farlands Dimension so it can provide a round gameplay experience, right now is barebones.
- Provide a better quality in textures.
- Polish the mobs animations and models.
- Provide a balanced exploration-combat experience.

[Bluesky](https://bsky.app/profile/arcadyanmagna.bsky.social)
